headline: Why Monday, April 13 Begins A Critical Week For The Stock Market Rally
summary: Monday begins a critical week for the stock market for several reasons.  Lastly, on the technical side, the stock market's powerful jump on Wednesday launched new rally.  Stock market performance in the coming week may help determine the strength and status of that upturn.
